title: Reduce Task Package in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'task/reduce' directory in Hadoop MapReduce houses the package declaration for classes related to the Reduce task. It serves as a namespace, organizing and grouping all classes associated with the Reduce phase. The package, 'org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.reduce', imports essential classes for stability and audience annotation. This directory does not contain core logic or algorithms but prepares the groundwork for the Reduce task's functionality by establishing a clear class hierarchy and dependencies. It collaborates with other directories to ensure a structured and maintainable codebase, embodying the principles of separation of concerns and modular design, key architectural patterns in software development.
